content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.5-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch delta against `ebfe49877d4c9d0fc55de4a3b81c203e30264495`. `nix build`, `cargo fmt --check`, and targeted stale/fresh tests passed, but two source-staleness propagation gaps remain.

## Amendments

1. `src/cli/milestone.rs:1881-1888` routes plan-inspection failures through `map_inspection_error`, and `src/cli/milestone.rs:2120-2127` wraps every non-milestone error into `MilestoneOperationFailed`. That includes the new `AppError::StaleMilestonePlan` raised by `validate_milestone_source_bundle_fresh` at `src/cli/milestone.rs:1992-1997`, so `milestone show/status` lose the structured staleness variant and callers can no longer match on the source run/bundle fields. The action path has the same issue via `ensure_execution_plan_available` at `src/cli/milestone.rs:1826-1833` and `map_action_error` at `src/cli/milestone.rs:2131-2138`. Pass `AppError::StaleMilestonePlan { .. }` through unchanged so downstream loads propagate structured staleness as required.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The bead explicitly requires structured stale detection to be surfaced by downstream plan-rendering and execution commands; wrapping it as a generic operation failure breaks that contract for automation and tests that inspect error variants.
2. The milestone controller resume path used from bead task execution can still bypass source-bundle freshness checks. `prepare_milestone_controller_for_execution` calls `resume_controller` directly at `src/cli/run.rs:1452-1459`, but the `ProjectMilestoneControllerRuntime::all_beads_closed` implementation at `src/cli/run.rs:1418-1433` only reads snapshot progress and never calls `validate_milestone_source_bundle_fresh`; the duplicate command runtime at `src/cli/milestone.rs:1712-1727` has the same blind spot. `resume_transition_request` then uses that result at `src/contexts/milestone_record/controller.rs:1035` and can transition Idle/Selecting controllers to Completed at `src/contexts/milestone_record/controller.rs:1052-1067` before any plan membership load triggers the new stale check. Add a source freshness validation before controller resume/completion decisions so a re-answered requirements bundle cannot leave the old materialized milestone silently marked complete or executable.
   Classification: fix_current_bead
   Rationale: The new staleness checks cover bead selection and export, but this controller path can still consume stale milestone state without warning after the source requirements bundle changes.
